## Summary

Describe the user-visible and scientific effect of this change.

## Evidence

- [ ] Unit or property tests added/updated
- [ ] Cross-package contract impact considered
- [ ] Numerical changes checked against an independent path
- [ ] GUI changes inspected at desktop and mobile sizes
- [ ] Documentation and NEWS updated
- [ ] No patient data, credentials, private publications, or generated workspaces are included

## Validation tier

State whether the affected capability remains **validated**, **verified**, or
**experimental**, and identify the evidence used.
